message:
chore(deps): update Cargo.toml and Cargo.lock dependencies

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2069,29 +2069,27 @@ dependencies = [

  "fsqlite-core",
  "fsqlite-error",
  "fsqlite-ext-fts5",
  "fsqlite-ext-json",
  "fsqlite-ext-rtree",

  "fsqlite-vfs",
 ]

  "crossbeam-deque",
@@ -2332,7 +2318,6 @@ dependencies = [

  "asupersync 0.2.8",
@@ -2348,7 +2333,6 @@ dependencies = [
 [[package]]
 name = "fsqlite-wal"
 version = "0.1.1"
-source = "git+https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensqlite?rev=05a5820#05a582038977b2dc2769e5f2e5b948b27abda5a7"
 dependencies = [
  "asupersync 0.2.8",
  "blake3",

@@ -35,7 +35,7 @@ notify = "*"
 rusqlite = { version = "*", features = ["bundled", "modern_sqlite"] }
 # FrankenSQLite foundation for staged storage migration (bead 300hj).
 # Keep rusqlite side-by-side during transition; migration code opts in explicitly.
-frankensqlite = { git = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensqlite", rev = "05a5820", package = "fsqlite", features = ["fts5"] }
+frankensqlite = { path = "../frankensqlite/crates/fsqlite", package = "fsqlite", features = ["fts5"] }
 rayon = "*"
 crossbeam-channel = "*"
 parking_lot = "*"
@@ -133,7 +133,7 @@ rand = "0.10"
 rand_chacha = "0.10"
 # frankensqlite compat gate tests (bead 3vvqa) — fsqlite-types needed for SqliteValue
 # enum variants in test assertions. The main fsqlite dep is available as `frankensqlite`.
-fsqlite-types = { git = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensqlite", rev = "05a5820" }
+fsqlite-types = { path = "../frankensqlite/crates/fsqlite-types" }
 
 [[bin]]
 name = "cass"
